6900.one_line_summary: Modular interfaces for smart contract accounts and modules with upgradable execution logic.
6900.notes: Extends ERC-4337 with modular architecture separating validation, execution, and hooks into composable modules.

6909.one_line_summary: Minimal multi-token standard combining ERC-20 allowance and ERC-1155 operator models without callbacks.
6909.notes: Removes batch operations and mandatory callbacks from ERC-1155; hybrid operator-approval permission system.

6932.one_line_summary: ERC-20 extension enabling subscription-based access requiring periodic automatic payments.
6932.notes: Adds subscribe/unsubscribe mechanics for recurring payments without manual intervention.

6944.one_line_summary: ERC-4804 resolveMode extension for ERC-5219 contract resource requests.
6944.notes: Minimal extension defining resolveMode return value for ERC-5219 resolution compatibility.

6956.one_line_summary: NFT standard anchoring tokens 1:1 to physical/digital assets with oracle-attested ownership transfers.
6956.notes: Permissionless transfers via attestations; designed for phygitals and off-chain asset tokenization.

6960.one_line_summary: Dual-layer token combining ERC-20/721/1155 with mainId/subId classification for RWAs.
6960.notes: Hierarchical token classification enabling fractional ownership of complex assets.

6981.one_line_summary: Registry generating deterministic smart contract addresses for future-owned user accounts.
6981.notes: Enables on-chain asset reception before account control assumption via signature verification.

6982.one_line_summary: Gas-efficient ERC-721 locking mechanism with DefaultLocked event on deployment.
6982.notes: Emits status changes only for specific tokens; useful for non-transferable/soulbound NFTs.

6997.one_line_summary: ERC-721 with validation step for transfers and approvals to prevent wallet draining.
6997.notes: Pending validations require authorization before execution; enables externalized validation.

7007.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for verifiable AI-generated content using zkML and opML proofs.
7007.notes: Indexes tokens by prompt; supports optional Enumerable and Updatable extensions for opML scenarios.

7015.one_line_summary: NFT creator attribution via EIP-712 signed CreatorAttribution event at deployment.
7015.notes: Allows correct creator attribution even when non-creator wallet deploys contract.

7053.one_line_summary: Interoperable digital media indexing using CIDs and Commit events across EVM chains.
7053.notes: Universal indexing method for traceability and discovery of digital media assets.

7066.one_line_summary: ERC-721 locking extension preventing transfers while preserving utility during collateralization.
7066.notes: Enables NFT-collateralized loans, rentals, and BNPL without asset escrow; locker controls unlock.

7085.one_line_summary: Establishes relationships and quantifiable attributes between ERC-721/1155 tokens.
7085.notes: Enables NFT graphs with derivative relationships and attribute metadata.

7087.one_line_summary: Query parameters for specifying MIME type of web3:// URL responses in auto mode.
7087.notes: Extends ERC-6860 with mime.content, mime.type, and mime.dataurl parameters.
